gates.requirement: The synchronized repair baseline is exactly the WP5 closeout merge commit and both long-lived branches are identical.
The original frozen WP5 canonical and post-merge SHA-256 ledgers remain byte-identical.
The exact changed-path boundary is five controlled replacements and twenty-two additive repair paths.
No checker, Lean, Coq, theorem, semantic fixture, or frozen WP0-WP4 path is modified.
The helper accepts relation 0 0 as an already-synchronized no-op.
The helper accepts relation 1 0 when development is an ancestor of main.
The helper accepts relation 2 0 when development is an ancestor of main.
The classifier accepts every nonnegative N 0 relation with N greater than zero.
Every fast-forward path retains git merge-base ancestry verification.
The only merge mode is git merge --ff-only.
The only remote update is a normal push without a force option.
Five replay fixtures reproduce expected decisions and diagnostics.
The repair successor ledger reproduces every controlled and additive repair file.
The existing WP5 and post-merge builders and verifiers remain replay-compatible.
Python regression, proof-hole scan, Lean, Coq, and git diff --check are mandatory.
The package applicator performs no commit, push, merge, release, publication, WP6 start, or Gate 3 decision.
